subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-18
subcodes.first_line: Children give to a person the greatest consolation. No matter how much the father is sad or cross, as soon as his darling child laughs or speaks, he is made happy.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اطفال خیلی مایهٴ سُرور و تسلی هستند من طفلی داشتم حسین افندی سه چهار ساله بود وقتی خواب بودم
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @parents and children; youth; families
